case neg
L : Logic ℕ
φ ψ χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
inst✝ : Entailment.F L
hφψ : L ⊢ φ ➝ ψ
hφ : φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΓ : ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode ψ)
hΓ₂ : Γ.conj ⋏ ψ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
hΓ₁ : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ Γ.conj ⋏ ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
this : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
⊢ False

failed_attempts: not_of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := ψ) (Γ := Γ) hΓ this hφ
hT <| T.imp_closed axiomI <| T.andIR this <| T.mem_of_provable impId

hψω : ψ ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      simpa using (mem_omega_of_mem (T := T) (hT := hT) (δ := ψ) this)
    have : ψ ∉ construction_omega T hT :=
      not_of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := ψ) (Γ := Γ) hΓ hΓ₂
    exact this hψω

hT (T.imp_closed (φ := χ) this (T.imp_closed hφψ hφ (mem_omega_of_mem (T := T) (χ := χ) (ξ := ξ) (hT := hT) (δ := Γ.conj) (T.imp_closed (φ := χ) (axiomK (φ := χ) (ψ := Γ.conj)) (construction_omega_mem_ant (L := L) (χ := χ) (ξ := ξ) (T := T) (hT := hT))))))

have hψomega : ψ ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      simpa using mem_omega_of_mem (T := T) (hT := hT) (δ := ψ) (φ := ψ) (h := T.mem_of_provable (φ := ψ ➝ ψ) impId)
    have hφomega : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      have : φ ∈ construction_omega T hT := hφ
      exact mem_omega_of_mem (T := T) (hT := hT) (δ := Γ.conj ⋏ φ) (h := by
        have : χ ➝ (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) ∈ T.theory := by
          -- obtain χ ➝ φ from membership of φ in ω and then strengthen to χ ➝ (Γ.conj ⋏ φ)
          have hχφ : χ ➝ φ ∈ T.theory := by
            rcases (of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (χ := χ) (ξ := ξ) (φ := φ) hφ) with h | h
            · exact h
            · exfalso
              have : φ ∉ construction_omega T hT := not_of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (χ := χ) (ξ := ξ)
                (φ := φ) (Γ := ∅) (by simpa) (by simpa using (T.mem_of_provable (φ := φ ➝ ξ) (by
                  have := impId (φ := φ); exact this)))
              exact this hφ
          -- use ⊢ φ ➝ (Γ.conj ➝ (Γ.conj ⋏ φ)) and closure
          have hφto : L ⊢ φ ➝ (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) := by
            sorry
          exact T.imp_closed hφto (T.imp_closed (axiomI (ψ := φ)) (T.andIR hχφ (T.mem_of_provable (φ := χ ➝ Γ.conj) (by
            sorry))))
        exact this)
    have : ξ ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      -- apply imp closure of ω to (Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ)
      have hmem : (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) ∈ (construction_omega T hT) := hφomega
      -- reuse construction_omega_impClosed recursively on ω via local closure proof
      have : ξ ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
        have hcx : χ ➝ (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) ∈ T.theory := by
          rcases (of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (χ := χ) (ξ := ξ) (φ := (Γ.conj ⋏ φ)) hmem) with h | h
          · exact h
          · exfalso
            have : (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) ∉ construction_omega T hT := not_of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (χ := χ) (ξ := ξ)
              (φ := (Γ.conj ⋏ φ)) (Γ := Γ) (by
                intro x hx

not_of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := ψ) (Γ := Γ)
      hΓ (T.imp_closed axiomI (T.andIR this (mem_omega_of_mem (T := T) (hT := hT) (δ := φ) (by
        rcases (of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) hφ) with hχφ | h

hψ : ψ ∉ construction_omega T hT := not_of_mem_construction_omega (φ := ψ) hΓ hΓ₂
    exact hψ (by
      have : χ ➝ ψ ∈ T.theory := T.imp_closed hφψ (by
        simpa [construction_omega] using hφ)
      exact mem_omega_of_mem (T := T) (hT := hT) this)

not_of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := ψ) (Γ := Γ)
      hΓ (T.imp_closed axiomI (T.andIR this (by
        have : χ ➝ φ ∈ T.theory := by
          rcases of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) hφ with hχφ | -
          · exact hχφ
          · exfalso
            exact not_of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) (Γ := Γ) (hΓ := by
              exact (hΓ.trans (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT)
                (i := encode ψ) (j := encode φ) (by exact le_of_lt (Nat.lt_succ_self _))))
            ) hΓ₂ hφ
        exact this)))

hφ' : φ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := by
      have hmono : construction T hT (encode φ) ⊆ construction T hT (encode ψ) :=
        monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode φ) (j := encode ψ) (by
          simpa using Encodable.encode_le_encode.2 (by simpa using show φ = φ from rfl))
      exact hmono hφ
    have hnot : φ ∉ construction_omega T hT :=
      not_of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := ψ) (Γ := Γ)
        (by
          intro δ hδ
          exact hΓ hδ)
        (by
          simpa [Formula.conj, Finset.conj] using this)
    exact hnot (by
      simp only [construction_omega, Set.mem_iUnion]
      exact ⟨encode ψ, hφ'⟩)

hT (T.imp_closed (φ := χ ➝ Γ.conj ⋏ φ) (ψ := χ ➝ ξ) (axiomI (φ := χ) (ψ := (Γ.conj ⋏ φ)) (χ := ξ)) (T.andIR (by
      have : χ ➝ (Γ.conj ⋏ φ) ∈ T.theory := by
        have hχ : χ ∈ construction_omega T hT := construction_omega_mem_ant (L := L) (T := T) (hT := hT) (χ := χ) (ξ := ξ)
        have hφ' : φ ∈ construction_omega T hT := hφ
        have hχ' : χ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (χ := χ) (ξ := ξ) (show 0 ≤ encode φ by exact Nat.zero_le _) ) (by
          simpa [construction] using (show χ ➝ χ ∈ T.theory from T.mem_of_provable impId))
        have hφ'' : φ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := by
          have : φ ∈ construction_omega T hT := hφ'
          rcases (by simpa [construction_omega, Set.mem_iUnion] using this) with ⟨i, hi⟩
          exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (χ := χ) (ξ := ξ) (by
            exact le_trans (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_self _)) (Nat.le_add_left _ _))) (by
            simpa [construction_omega] using this) |>.elim
        exact T.imp_closed (φ := χ) (ψ := Γ.conj ⋏ φ) (by
          exact axiomI) (by
          exact T.L_subset (by
            apply Logic.iff_provable.mp

hT <| T.imp_closed (φ := χ) this <| by
      have hχφ : χ ➝ φ ∈ T.theory := by
        rcases of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) hφ with hχφ | hcontra
        · exact hχφ
        · exfalso
          exact not_of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) (Γ := ∅) (by simpa using (by intro x hx
hT (T.imp_closed (φ := χ) (axiomI (ψ := Γ.conj ⋏ φ)) (T.andIR (T.L_subset (Logic.iff_provable.mp hφ)) this))

hT (T.mem_trans this (mem_omega_of_mem (T := T) (hT := hT) (δ := φ) (by
      have : φ ∈ construction T hT 0 := by
        simpa [construction] using (T.mem_of_provable (L := L) (T := T) (φ := χ ➝ φ) (hφ := impId))
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := 0) (j := encode φ) (Nat.zero_le _) this) ) ))

hT (T.imp_closed axiomI (T.andIR this (by
      have : χ ➝ φ ∈ T.theory := by
        rcases of_mem_construction_omega (T := T) (hT := hT) (φ := φ) hφ with hχφ | hbad
        · exact hχφ
        · exfalso
          exact hbad ∅ (by simp)))

hφ' : φ ∈ construction_omega T hT := hφ
    have hconj : Γ.conj ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      have hΓ' : ∀ δ, δ ∈ Γ → δ ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
        intro δ hδ
